title: FORJA/TRUST
description: AnkrForja Protocol — Trust Contract. Declares what AI agents are permitted to do, at what tier, and under what kill switch conditions. (FRJ-004, FRJ-005, FRJ-010, FRJ-011, FRJ-015)

trust_tier.description: Trust tier. 0=off (no AI access), 1=read-only, 2=low-risk write, 3=full autonomy.

service_id.description: Forja service ID — must match identity.id in the service's STATE manifest.

default_tier.description: Tier applied to any action type NOT explicitly declared in action_tiers. Default is 0 (off). (FRJ-005) — silence is not permission.

action_tiers.description: Per-action-type trust tier declarations. Trust is declared per action, not per service globally. (FRJ-004)

action_id.description: Matches a capability ID from the service's STATE manifest ai_surface.

action_type.description: Category of action this tier declaration applies to.

tier.description: Trust tier for this specific action type.

conditions.description: Optional additional conditions that must be met before this tier is applied.

threshold.description: Numeric threshold (for health, error_rate, confidence conditions).

requires_rollback_descriptor.description: Whether a rollback descriptor is required before this action executes. (FRJ-008) Always true for Tier 2+.

inherently_irreversible.description: If true, this action cannot be rolled back by nature (e.g. sent email, published blockchain tx). Must be declared here pre-execution, not discovered post-execution. (FRJ-008)

log_before_execute.description: Whether action must be logged before execution. Always true for Tier 2+. (FRJ-007)

kill_switch.description: Automatic kill switch configuration. Required for any service operating at Tier 2 or above. (FRJ-010, FRJ-022)

enabled.description: Whether the kill switch is active. Must be true for Tier 2+ services.

error_rate_threshold.description: SENSE error_rate value that triggers automatic tier suspension. (FRJ-022) Default: 0.02 (2%).

fallback_tier.description: Tier to drop to when kill switch fires. Typically 1 (read-only) or 0 (off).

notification_endpoint.description: Webhook endpoint to notify when kill switch fires.

sense_snapshot_on_trigger.description: Whether to capture a full SENSE snapshot when the kill switch fires. Recommended for root cause analysis. (FRJ-YK-009)

auto_recovery.description: Configuration for automatic tier recovery after kill switch fires.

enabled.description: Whether automatic tier recovery is permitted. Default false — human decision required. (FRJ-009)

recovery_threshold.description: SENSE error_rate must fall below this for auto-recovery to be considered.

minimum_stable_duration_seconds.description: Minimum time (seconds) error_rate must stay below recovery_threshold before auto-recovery.

self_escalation_prevention.description: Configuration for preventing AI agents from escalating their own trust tier. (FRJ-011)

enabled.description: Must be true. AI agents cannot escalate their own tier. This is a non-negotiable protocol constraint.

rejection_code.description: Error code returned when self-escalation is attempted.

tier_history_endpoint.description: Endpoint where tier change history can be audited. Tier changes must be logged with human authorization token. (FRJ-015)

authorized_agents.description: Optional: specific agent identifiers authorized to act on this service. If empty, any agent that satisfies trust tier conditions may act.

agent_id.description: Unique identifier for the authorized agent.

max_tier.description: Maximum tier this agent may operate at on this service.

authorized_actions.description: Specific action IDs this agent is authorized for. If empty, all declared actionable surfaces apply.

effective_from.description: When this trust contract became effective.

authorized_by.description: Human identifier who authorized this trust contract.

last_reviewed.description: When this contract was last reviewed by a human.

review_frequency_days.description: How often this trust contract should be reviewed.

conditions.description: Service health must be above 0.80 before write actions are permitted.
